response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with over 15 years of software engineering experience, directly matching the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack while bringing highly relevant, niche experience in AI agent infrastructure. His background in TDD, cloud deployments, and scalable microservices perfectly aligns with the role's architectural and engineering requirements.
strengths: Deep expertise in the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling
Strong advocacy and hands-on experience with TDD, testing frameworks, and CI/CD
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (though testing fundamentals are exceptional)
Started current role very recently (April 2025), which may indicate flight risk
Some recent roles have relatively short tenures (1-2 years)

key_factors.factor: Core stack and AI agent match
